hero.subtitle: Without hiring one.

problem.title: The problem
problem.text: A single SDR costs $50k+/year for 200 to 300 outreaches per month. Most SMBs pay for tools they barely use, outreach happens in bursts, and pipeline dries up between campaigns.

models.title: Two ways to work with ZPT

managed.title: Managed Service
managed.description: ZPT runs everything. Enrichment, content, outreach drafting. Output delivered via dashboard or pushed to integrations of choice (HubSpot, etc.).

selfDeploy.title: Self-Deploy
selfDeploy.description: ZPT deploys the local folder structure and connects it to the company's Claude account. Periodic updates and support included.

cases.stat: Enriched 20,000 contacts in one day. Replaced a $50k SDR function.
Pipeline building in the Dutch equipment leasing market.

hero.title: How ZPT Works
hero.description: AI agents that chain multiple steps together autonomously. Source, research, qualify, draft, follow up. Just like a human sales rep would.

items.title: Connect existing tools
items.description: HubSpot, Apollo, LinkedIn, Google Maps, email. No migration. No new software.

items.title: ZPT sources and enriches prospects
items.description: Multi-channel sourcing: LinkedIn, directories, maps, conferences, competitor intel, job postings.

items.title: Personalized outreach, ready for approval
items.description: Every draft uses the company's voice, positioning, and specific prospect research. Nothing generic.

items.title: Pipeline managed end-to-end
items.description: Full activity logging, follow-up tracking, CRM sync, weekly reporting.

enrichment.title: Enrichment templates
enrichment.description: The company provides unstructured content and guidelines. ZPT turns that into structured, actionable intelligence.
enrichment.note: ICP scoring uses the company's own criteria and context. The more detailed the input, the better the analysis.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: A fraction of what a single SDR costs.

about.title: About ZPT
paragraphs: ZPT started as a sales folder for a financial analytics startup. The system, markdown files, AI agents, and structured workflows, ended up more valuable than the product it was built to sell.
Two other companies asked for their own version. ZPT became a standalone product.
Today, ZPT operates across three industries: financial analytics, equipment leasing, and logistics. Same system, different context.
The vision: give any B2B company the output of a full sales team at a fraction of the cost, using AI agents that connect to the tools the company already uses.
ZPT is based in Europe. The product is live and operational.
about.cta: Set up 15 min intro call to learn more

cases.title: Logistics Company
cases.description: 20,000 contacts enriched in a single day. Full prospect profiles with decision-maker identification, company intelligence, and outreach-ready data. Replaced a $50k/year SDR function.

cases.title: Equipment Leasing
cases.description: Pipeline building in the Dutch equipment leasing market. Structured prospect sourcing across directories, industry events, and LinkedIn. Ongoing enrichment and outreach support.
